examples: We did many tests with upholsterer before we received properly tough but comfortable furniture.
It could be the premise of a romance novel: an upholsterer finds a 200-year-old love letter tucked into the arm of a 19th-century armchair.
He's an upholsterer who says that no one wants to hire someone his age.
Within a fortnight of the ceasefire, says Qasim Hussein, an upholsterer, the party had fitted a shiny new metal shutter onto his damaged workshop.
In One57's den, it took five tries before the green lacquer was dark enough, and the first upholsterer working on a voluptuous chair in the living room quit because of the job's difficulty.
